readinessScoring: Binary GO completion only; 0 means the Industrial Integration-Ready gate is not yet accepted. It is not an implementation-progress estimate.
lastClosed: #2270 Industrial one-deal PostgreSQL 16 E2E exploitation gate
#2276 Persistent identity, session rotation, revocation and MFA
#2287 Runtime separation of auth and deal PostgreSQL principals
#2291 Forward-only backup, restore and isolated DR rehearsal
#2378 Industrial transaction core and durable PostgreSQL outbox worker
#2379 PostgreSQL bank reconciliation and callback-key rotation/revocation
#2404 Industrial CI correctness/load gate and per-deal advisory locking
#2406 Fail closed on missing deal execution facts

durableOutboxWorkerImplementation.remainingBoundary: IR-20 must remove the legacy process-memory relay and enforce one production owner.

openBlockers: Documents, Logistics, Labs, Settlement reads/commands and Disputes can still bind process-memory repositories.
Legacy OutboxRelayService and process-memory OutboxService still coexist with DurableOutboxWorker.
Inbound webhook idempotency is process-memory and no durable integration inbox exists.
Partner API credentials and webhook subscriptions are process-memory.
Canonical Auction/Deal Basis and versioned Payment Terms are incomplete; winnerBidId is carried in a legacy field.
Logistics admission, laboratory custody, document lifecycle and dispute state machines are not yet fully PostgreSQL-authoritative.
Evidence object retention, malware quarantine and repeatable signature verification are not accepted.
Adapter conformance, vendor mappings and fail-closed live configuration are incomplete.
Role cabinets and offline acknowledgement are not fully proven against authoritative server state.
Production configuration, dedicated worker topology, SLO operations, HA, provider PITR/restore, production-scale load and external security acceptance are unproven.
blockerNotes: The merged Deal, identity, reconciliation and durable-worker slices are retained as evidence, not extrapolated into platform-wide readiness. Industrial Integration-Ready remains NO-GO until every mandatory gate in the governing specification has exact-commit evidence.
lockedUntilCurrentGreen: IR-22 Persistent Partner API and Outbound Webhooks
IR-30 through IR-90 in dependency order
currentAcceptance: Production DocumentsModule binds DOCUMENT_REPOSITORY directly to a complete Prisma implementation; RuntimeCore is absent from the production Documents dependency graph.
Repository mode parsing is typed and fail-closed; production rejects memory, missing and unknown document repository modes before accepting traffic.
Memory implementation remains available only through an explicit test or development profile.
Document list, read, upload metadata, sign-state transition and deal-package generation persist through restart and a second API instance.
Tenant, actor, role, deal access and immutable-state authority are derived on the server and enforced inside a trusted RLS transaction.
Cross-tenant reads and writes fail under a restricted NOBYPASSRLS principal; every tenant-owned document table has ENABLE and FORCE RLS.
Document state change, audit event and outbox event commit atomically or roll back together.
Confirmed document evidence cannot be overwritten; correction creates a new version linked to the superseded version.
No production method returns synthetic file content, mock signature success or a client-authored evidence status.
Forward migration succeeds on an empty and baseline database, drift is empty, targeted unit/integration/restart/idempotency/concurrency/RLS tests pass, and exact-head CI is green.
nextAfterCurrentGreen: IR-22 Persistent Partner API and Outbound Webhooks
IR-30 Canonical Deal and Payment Basis
IR-32 Lab, Documents and Disputes State Machines
IR-50 Adapter Conformance followed by IR-51 through IR-55
IR-60 and IR-61 Role UI, Offline, Localization and Accessibility
IR-70 through IR-72 Production Profile, Operations, Load, HA and DR
readiness: NO-GO. Baseline 66bf4655 contains a PostgreSQL-authoritative Deal core and isolated evidence for identity, reconciliation, durable worker mechanics and CI-scale correctness. Platform-wide repository authority, single outbox ownership, durable inbox/partner state, canonical evidence, production operations, HA/DR/load and external security acceptance remain open.
